mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM cat_dynamic_form_linkage_node WHERE form_id = #{formId}
AND version = #{version}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cat_dynamic_form_linkage_node (id, rule_id, parent_id, node_type, trigger_field_id, trigger_condition, trigger_value, sort_order, deleted, create_by, create_time, update_time) SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), rule_id, parent_id, node_type, trigger_field_id, trigger_condition, trigger_value, sort_order, '0', create_by, NOW(), NOW() FROM cat_dynamic_form_linkage_node WHERE rule_id IN ( SELECT id FROM cat_dynamic_form_linkage_rule WHERE form_id = #{formId} AND version = #{sourceVersion} AND deleted = '0' )
